examName: AWS AIF-C01 Mock Exam - Full Coverage

questions.text: Which AWS service provides a unified interface to access foundation models from Amazon, Anthropic, Meta, and others, with features like guardrails and knowledge bases?
questions.explanation: Amazon Bedrock is the fully managed service that provides access to multiple foundation models and includes Guardrails, Knowledge Bases, and Agents.

questions.text: A company wants to build a conversational AI assistant that can understand customer inquiries, maintain context, and handle follow-up questions naturally. Which AWS service is most suitable?
questions.explanation: Amazon Lex powers conversational interfaces with natural language understanding and context management.

questions.text: Which of the following are foundation model families available in Amazon Bedrock? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Claude and Llama are available in Bedrock. GPT-4 and Gemini are not currently available in Bedrock.

questions.text: Place the following steps for setting up a Knowledge Base (RAG) in Amazon Bedrock in the correct order: 1. Create vector index, 2. Query knowledge base, 3. Ingest documents from S3, 4. Create knowledge base and configure data source
questions.explanation: First create the knowledge base, then create/configure the vector index, ingest documents, then query.

questions.text: Which prompt engineering technique assigns a persona or role to the model (e.g., 'You are a senior financial analyst')?
questions.explanation: Role-based prompting assigns a specific persona to guide the model's responses.

questions.text: A company wants to automatically categorize customer support emails by topic (billing, technical issue, account question) and prioritize urgent ones. Which AWS service can perform this text classification?
questions.explanation: Amazon Comprehend provides custom classification for text documents.

questions.text: Which of the following are benefits of Amazon Bedrock Guardrails? (Select TWO)
options: Block harmful content and deny specific topics
Automatically fine-tune models on new data
Apply safety policies consistently across multiple foundation models
questions.explanation: Guardrails provide safety controls and can be applied consistently across different models.

questions.text: A developer is using Amazon Bedrock and notices the model is generating inconsistent responses. They want to make output more predictable for extracting customer names and order IDs. Which technique is most appropriate?
questions.explanation: Few-shot prompting provides examples of the desired output format, making responses more consistent.

questions.text: Which AWS service is purpose-built for extracting text, tables, and form data from scanned documents and PDFs?
questions.explanation: Amazon Textract extracts text, handwriting, tables, and forms from documents.

questions.text: Match each AWS service to its primary use case: 1. Amazon Polly, 2. Amazon Transcribe, 3. Amazon Lex, 4. Amazon Translate
questions.explanation: Polly = text-to-speech, Transcribe = speech-to-text, Lex = chatbots, Translate = translation.

questions.text: A model performs extremely well on training data (99% accuracy) but poorly on validation data (60% accuracy). Which term describes this?
questions.explanation: Overfitting occurs when a model memorizes training data but fails to generalize to new data.

questions.text: A company wants to build a personalized recommendation engine for their e-commerce website. Which AWS service is purpose-built for this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Personalize is purpose-built for real-time recommendations and personalization.

questions.text: Which of the following are AWS Managed AI Services for text analysis? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Comprehend and Translate both work with text. Rekognition is for images/video, Polly is text-to-speech, Textract extracts text from documents.

questions.text: Place the phases of a machine learning project in correct order: 1. Model deployment, 2. Data collection, 3. Model training, 4. Business problem definition
questions.explanation: Define the business problem first, then collect data, train the model, and finally deploy.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides intelligent search with natural language understanding for enterprise document search?
questions.explanation: Amazon Kendra is purpose-built for intelligent enterprise search with natural language Q&A.

questions.text: A developer wants to use an AI assistant to help debug code and suggest fixes directly within their IDE. Which Amazon Q offering should they use?
questions.explanation: Amazon Q Developer is designed for coding assistance within IDEs.

questions.text: Which of the following are components of Responsible AI? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Fairness and explainability are key pillars of Responsible AI.

questions.text: A generative AI model produces confident-sounding but factually incorrect information about historical events. What is this called?
questions.explanation: Hallucination is when a generative model produces factually incorrect but plausible-sounding information.

questions.text: An organization wants to grant temporary permissions to an EC2 instance to access an S3 bucket without storing long-term credentials. Which IAM component should they use?
questions.explanation: IAM Roles provide temporary credentials to AWS services like EC2.

questions.text: Which AWS service is serverless and runs code in response to events without provisioning servers?
questions.explanation: AWS Lambda runs code in response to events without server management.

questions.text: Which of the following are SageMaker governance and monitoring features? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Model Monitor detects drift, Clarify detects bias and provides explainability.

questions.text: A company wants to automatically detect PII such as patient names and medical record numbers in unstructured clinical notes. Which AWS service is purpose-built for medical text analysis?
questions.explanation: Amazon Comprehend Medical is purpose-built for detecting medical entities in text.

questions.text: Place the steps for a typical RAG workflow in order: 1. Generate response, 2. Retrieve documents, 3. Convert query to vector, 4. User asks question, 5. Add context to prompt
questions.explanation: User asks, query is vectorized, relevant documents retrieved, context added to prompt, then LLM generates response.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides automated detection of sensitive data (like credit card numbers) in S3 buckets?
questions.explanation: Amazon Macie uses ML to discover and protect sensitive data in S3.

questions.text: A company wants to evaluate multiple foundation models on metrics like accuracy and toxicity before selecting one. Which Bedrock feature enables this?
questions.explanation: Bedrock Model Evaluation allows comparing foundation models on various metrics.

questions.text: Which of the following are IAM best practices? (Select TWO)
options: Use root user for daily tasks
Store access keys in code repos
questions.explanation: MFA and least privilege are core IAM best practices.

questions.text: A model consistently predicts house prices $50,000 lower than actual values across all price ranges. Which term describes this?
questions.explanation: Systematic error in predictions indicates high bias.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides a central dashboard of AWS security best practices and recommendations?
questions.explanation: AWS Trusted Advisor provides recommendations for cost, performance, security, and fault tolerance.

questions.text: A company wants to track and compare multiple ML training runs with different hyperparameters. Which SageMaker feature should they use?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Experiments tracks and compares training runs, hyperparameters, and metrics.

questions.text: Which AWS service records API activity for auditing and compliance?
questions.explanation: AWS CloudTrail records API calls for auditing and security analysis.

questions.text: Which of the following are challenges specific to Generative AI? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Hallucinations and prompt injection are unique challenges for generative AI models.

questions.text: A company needs to automatically moderate user-uploaded images for inappropriate content. Which AWS service should they use?
questions.explanation: Amazon Rekognition Content Moderation detects inappropriate content in images and videos.

questions.text: Match each AWS security service to its primary function: 1. AWS Config, 2. Amazon Inspector, 3. AWS Artifact, 4. AWS Audit Manager
questions.explanation: Config tracks resource configs, Inspector scans for vulnerabilities, Artifact provides compliance reports, Audit Manager collects audit evidence.

questions.text: What is MLOps focused on?
questions.explanation: MLOps automates the end-to-end ML lifecycle including CI/CD, monitoring, and governance.

questions.text: A company wants to build a voice-enabled chatbot. The chatbot needs to understand spoken language, maintain context, and speak responses. Which combination is most appropriate?
questions.explanation: Lex handles conversation and includes speech recognition, Polly handles speech output, Lambda handles business logic.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides a no-code visual interface for data preparation in SageMaker?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Data Wrangler provides a no-code visual interface for data preparation.

questions.text: Which of the following are AWS services that process audio/speech? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Polly = text-to-speech, Transcribe = speech-to-text.

questions.text: A company wants to forecast next month's product demand based on historical sales data. Which AWS service is purpose-built for this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Forecast is purpose-built for time-series forecasting.

questions.text: What does the AWS Shared Responsibility Model state?
options: AWS is responsible for security OF the cloud; customer is responsible for security IN the cloud
AWS is responsible for all security
Customer is responsible for all security
Security is automatically handled by default
questions.explanation: AWS secures the infrastructure; customers secure their data, applications, and configurations.

questions.text: Which SageMaker feature helps create labeled datasets using a combination of ML and human review?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Ground Truth combines automated labeling with human review for high-quality datasets.

questions.text: Place the steps for creating a secure S3 bucket with IAM permissions in the correct order: 1. Create bucket, 2. Create IAM policy, 3. Attach policy to user, 4. Configure bucket policy
questions.explanation: Create bucket first, then create IAM policy, configure bucket policy if needed, then attach IAM policy to user/role.

questions.text: A company wants to add human review to their AI document processing pipeline for low-confidence predictions. Which AWS service provides this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Augmented AI (A2I) adds human review workflows to AI predictions.

questions.text: Which of the following are SageMaker built-in algorithms? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: XGBoost and Linear Learner are built-in algorithms. TensorFlow and PyTorch are frameworks.

questions.text: What does RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) involve?
options: Using human preferences to fine-tune model behavior
questions.explanation: RLHF uses human feedback to align model outputs with human preferences.

questions.text: A company wants to run thousands of parallel batch inference jobs cost-effectively without provisioning servers. Which SageMaker capability is most appropriate?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Batch Transform is designed for batch inference on large datasets.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides self-service access to AWS compliance reports and agreements?
questions.explanation: AWS Artifact provides on-demand access to AWS compliance reports and agreements.

questions.text: A malicious user crafts input that bypasses an LLM's safety filters. What is this attack called?
questions.explanation: Prompt injection involves crafting inputs that bypass safety filters or cause unintended behavior.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides continuous monitoring of resource configurations and compliance against desired policies?
questions.explanation: AWS Config tracks resource configurations and evaluates compliance against desired policies.

questions.text: A company wants to build a document search system where employees ask natural language questions like 'Show me Q3 reports' and get accurate results. Which service is purpose-built for this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Kendra provides intelligent search with natural language understanding.

questions.text: Which of the following are components of the AWS Shared Responsibility Model? (Select TWO)
options: AWS is responsible for physical infrastructure
Customer is responsible for physical infrastructure
Customer is responsible for their data and applications
AWS is responsible for customer access keys
AWS is responsible for customer IAM configurations
questions.explanation: AWS secures physical infrastructure; customers secure their data, applications, and configurations.

questions.text: A data scientist is evaluating a fraud detection model. Results: 45 true positives, 20 false positives, 5 false negatives. What is precision?
Which AWS service automatically detects and protects sensitive data in S3 buckets using ML?
questions.explanation: Amazon Macie uses ML to discover and protect sensitive data in S3.

questions.text: Match each AWS service to its use case: 1. Amazon Rekognition, 2. Amazon Textract, 3. Amazon Comprehend, 4. Amazon Transcribe
questions.explanation: Rekognition = image/video, Textract = document extraction, Comprehend = NLP, Transcribe = speech-to-text.

questions.text: A company wants to ensure their AI model does not discriminate based on gender or ethnicity. Which Responsible AI pillar does this address?
questions.explanation: Fairness ensures models do not discriminate against protected groups.

questions.text: Which of the following are benefits of Amazon Q Business? (Select TWO)
options: Answers questions using internal company data
Connects to data sources like S3 and SharePoint
questions.explanation: Amazon Q Business answers questions from company data and connects to various data sources.

questions.text: Which AWS service provides on-demand access to AWS security and compliance documentation?
questions.explanation: AWS Artifact provides access to AWS compliance reports and agreements.

questions.text: Place the steps for building and deploying a model in SageMaker in correct order: 1. Deploy to endpoint, 2. Train, 3. Prepare data, 4. Create notebook, 5. Evaluate
questions.explanation: Create notebook first, prepare data, train, evaluate, then deploy.

questions.text: A company wants to automatically run code whenever a file is uploaded to S3. Which service should trigger the code?
questions.explanation: AWS Lambda can be triggered directly by S3 events.

questions.text: Which SageMaker feature automatically detects model drift after deployment?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Model Monitor detects model drift and data quality issues after deployment.

questions.text: A company wants to add human workers to perform simple data labeling tasks. Which AWS service provides this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Mechanical Turk provides a crowdsourced workforce for simple tasks.

questions.text: Which of the following are Amazon Bedrock features? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Guardrails and Knowledge Bases are Bedrock features. Others are separate AWS services.

questions.text: A company wants to automatically detect and remediate non-compliant AWS resource configurations. Which service should they use?
questions.explanation: AWS Config tracks resources and can trigger remediation for non-compliant configurations.

questions.text: What is the purpose of SageMaker Clarify?
options: Detect bias and explain model predictions
questions.explanation: SageMaker Clarify detects bias and provides explainability for model predictions.

questions.text: A company wants to build an application using foundation models with minimal infrastructure management. Which AWS service provides this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Bedrock provides access to foundation models as a fully managed service.

questions.text: Which of the following are IAM best practices? (Select TWO)
options: Use root user for daily tasks
Use only one IAM user for everyone
questions.explanation: MFA and least privilege are core IAM security best practices.
